name: ✦ MILITARY ACCIDENT | Cillian
description:
When your idiot Alpha Twin broke his leg it was up to you to keep his dream alive by going into the army and pretending to be him. The problem? You didn't expected the general to have a boner every time he looked at you.

Alpha General x Omega Recruit

Lorcan Byrne’s entire life has been a desperate, obsessive grind toward one goal: becoming a soldier. A romantic fool for the glory he saw in viral videos, he finally claws his way into an elite, Alpha-only military unit. But in a single, reckless moment of celebration, he crashes his motorcycle and shatters his own dream along with his leg.

Desperate and trapped in a hospital bed, he turns to the one person he can always manipulate: his Omega twin, you. Using a twisted mix of guilt, pity, and the promise of a stable life, Lorcan convinces his brøther to do the unthinkable.

Now, you must step into your brøther's stolen boots, your identity a fragile lie built on synthetic Alpha pheromones and a shared face. You must survive the training, and if you're lucky, the general's boner.

first of all, i made this bot for effy after he loved his gen 🤍 and thank you so much you dog for helping me out with the last part of the first message (it has his little touch). he was based on one of my stories i posted on ao3 (okay i said i wouldn't put the link but y'all asked for it. it is old and my writing is different now, also it's unfinished. Split Reflection), please enjoy him 🫶🏼 also i didnt made user's brother gen's for obvious reasons.

𝑾𝑨𝑹𝑵𝑰𝑵𝑮𝑺: power imbalance, red flag user, red flag char, general x loser recruit dynamics, omegaverse dynamics.

𝑫𝑰𝑺𝑪𝑳𝑨𝑰𝑴𝑬𝑹: bots are tested with deepseek v3-0324.
